name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: East Cleveland's PLS Check Cashers at 13520 Euclid Ave operates 24/7 for all your check cashing needs.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers is located at 13520 Euclid Ave in East Cleveland, OH, operating as a standalone check cashing service. The store is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week, making it available whenever you need to cash a check. Whether early morning, late night, or weekend, the East Cleveland location is ready to serve you.

This East Cleveland branch provides comprehensive check cashing services for personal and business checks. You can reach the location at +1 216-451-7994 to confirm processing times, ask about acceptable forms of ID, or inquire about any fees. The professional staff can guide you through the check cashing process quickly and efficiently.

If you're an East Cleveland resident or business owner who needs quick access to cash from your check, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check to the Euclid Ave location. PLS Check Cashers makes it simple to convert checks to cash without the hassle of traditional banking hours.
pros: 24/7 operating hours at all locations for round-the-clock access to financial services
Multi-state presence across 12 states provides geographic accessibility for customers
Comprehensive service offering combining check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and vehicle registration in single locations
Ria Money Transfer partnership enables domestic and international money transfers
Notary services available for legal documents (wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney)
Prepaid debit card option (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard) with mobile app access
Additional convenience services including fax, copy, ATM access, and phone top-ups
cons: Check-cashing services charge fees for transactions, making them more expensive than traditional bank checking accounts
No credit-building benefits—transactions with PLS do not contribute to credit history or credit score improvement
Limited to financial transactions and administrative services without lending, savings, or investment products
As a check-cashing operation, primarily serves unbanked/underbanked populations rather than those seeking comprehensive banking
Recent privacy policy updates may indicate data collection practices that warrant consumer review
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing and bill payment services
Individuals requiring government benefits payment or money transfer services without bank accounts
People needing vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plate services bundled with financial services
Consumers in 12-state service area seeking 24/7 access to notary services and document authentication
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in its 12-state service area who need immediate access to check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and administrative services like vehicle registration—particularly those who value 24/7 availability. The primary caveat is that check-cashing services charge transaction fees and do not build credit history, making them suitable for one-time or immediate financial needs rather than long-term financial development or account building.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 13520 Euclid Ave, East Cleveland, OH - 24-hour check cashing service.
